title: License required
doc_html:
§1902.  License required

It is unlawful for any person, either as principal or agent, to engage in business as a transient merchant in the State of Louisiana without having first obtained a license in the manner provided in this Part.
doc_text:
§1902.  License required
It is unlawful for any person, either as principal or agent, to engage in business as a transient merchant in the State of Louisiana without having first obtained a license in the manner provided in this Part.
